headline: PayPal Nexi Tie Up Tests Growth Story As Shares Lag
summary: PayPal Holdings and Nexi have expanded their partnership to integrate PayPal’s payment ecosystem into Nexi’s merchant platform across Europe. The agreement deepens PayPal’s presence with European merchants by making its digital wallet and checkout options more readily available within Nexi’s infrastructure. The integration focuses on giving Nexi’s merchant base broader access to PayPal’s services at the point of sale, both online and in store. For investors tracking NasdaqGS:PYPL, this move...

headline: PayPal (PYPL) Stock Down Significantly After Jim Cramer Advised Careful Buying
summary: PayPal Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ:PYPL) is one of Jim Cramer’s Biggest Cryptocurrency and Blockchain Stock Hits & Misses. Payments platform provider PayPal Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ:PYPL)’s shares haven’t performed well lately. They are down by 33% over the past year and by 65% since Cramer discussed them in January. One notable dip in the stock came in […]
